content: {"stories": [{"title": "Evidence effort reduction", "situation": "Manual evidence cutting for delivery scenarios took about 3 hours per scenario.", "task": "Reduce the evidence effort while keeping governance intact.", "action": "Led end-to-end delivery and authored the executive change request to automate the process.", "result": "Cut evidence effort from about 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario, a 92% reduction.", "metrics": {"before_hours": "3", "after_minutes": "15", "reduction": "92%"}, "tags": ["delivery", "automation"]}, {"title": "Delivery recovery of an infeasible SIT window", "situation": "A SIT window of 75+ hours was mathematically infeasible for the program.", "task": "Recover the delivery schedule without compromising quality.", "action": "Directed the program portfolio and cross-functional teams to restructure the plan.", "result": "Converted the infeasible 75 hour window into a deliverable plan across a portfolio valued at over $5M.", "metrics": {"sit_window_hours": "75", "portfolio_value": "$5M"}, "tags": ["program-management", "recovery"]}]}
